name: nova-proxy
description: Nova Proxy — all-in-one VLESS/Trojan/Shadowsocks proxy panel on a Cloudflare Worker (D1, users, Telegram bot, WARP, optional backend mode).

DB.description: The D1 database Nova uses for storage. Cloudflare creates this automatically — keep the default. Nova builds its own tables on first run, no migration needed.

PASSWORD.description: Optional. Leave blank — after deploy, open your Worker URL and the **/install** wizard asks you to set an admin password. You can also set it later under Settings → Variables.

UUID.description: Optional. Leave blank — Nova auto-derives a UUID. Only set this if you want a specific VLESS UUID.
